item.title: The Zodiac Killer's Identity Remains One Of History's Biggest Mysteries
item.description: More than five decades after a series of murders terrorized Northern California, the Zodiac Killer has never been officially identified. Cryptic letters, coded messages, and countless suspects have kept the case alive, making it one of the most famous unsolved mysteries in true crime history.

media:content.media:title: The Zodiac Killer's Identity Remains One Of History's Biggest Mysteries
media:content.media:description: More than five decades after a series of murders terrorized Northern California, the Zodiac Killer has never been officially identified. Cryptic letters, coded messages, and countless suspects have kept the case alive, making it one of the most famous unsolved mysteries in true crime history.

item.title: Russian Mob Or Vampires The Mystery Of Susan Walsh
item.description: Susan Walsh was a journalist investigating alleged Russian mob activity and New York's underground vampire subculture when she vanished without a trace in 1996. Nearly three decades later, her disappearance remains unsolved, fueling theories that range from organized crime to dangers much closer to home.

media:content.media:title: Russian Mob Or Vampires The Mystery Of Susan Walsh
media:content.media:description: Susan Walsh was a journalist investigating alleged Russian mob activity and New York's underground vampire subculture when she vanished without a trace in 1996. Nearly three decades later, her disappearance remains unsolved, fueling theories that range from organized crime to dangers much closer to home.

item.title: Thousands Sent Love Letters To A Convicted Killer
item.description: After Wade Wilson was convicted of murdering two women in Florida, prison officials reported that he received thousands of messages, letters, and photos from admirers. The unusual public fascination with the case sparked widespread discussion about why some notorious criminals attract devoted followers.

media:content.media:title: Thousands Sent Love Letters To A Convicted Killer
media:content.media:description: After Wade Wilson was convicted of murdering two women in Florida, prison officials reported that he received thousands of messages, letters, and photos from admirers. The unusual public fascination with the case sparked widespread discussion about why some notorious criminals attract devoted followers.

item.title: At Just 17 He Became The Focus Of A Chilling Case
item.description: Gavon Ramsay was still a teenager when investigators linked him to a disturbing crime that shocked his community. The case raised difficult questions about youth violence, accountability, and the warning signs that may have been missed before tragedy struck.

media:content.media:title: At Just 17 He Became The Focus Of A Chilling Case
media:content.media:description: Gavon Ramsay was still a teenager when investigators linked him to a disturbing crime that shocked his community. The case raised difficult questions about youth violence, accountability, and the warning signs that may have been missed before tragedy struck.
